notes: Phase 3 #6 fork of macos.qqmusic.play_visible_row.v0's ascii-aa-row-fallback case.

v0 used debug.clickScreenText for press-result-play (always pointer). v1 uses debug.smartPress; expected strategy on QQ音乐 is unknown — the play control may or may not be an AXButton in the current build.

Promotion criterion: ≥3 hands-off replays must complete the full chain; the recorded smartPress.strategy may differ between them. If all 3 record pointer-click fallback, that is itself a useful data point (documents that QQ音乐's play control is not AX-pressable today).
Phase 3 #6 fork of macos.qqmusic.play_visible_row.v0's chinese-query-row-fallback case.
Inherits the v0 semantic-selection boundary: requested_title=晴天 but observed playback is 天空仍灿烂. v1 does not narrow that boundary; it only re-grounds the play control press.
Promotion criterion identical to the ASCII case.
